text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Day and the start of Inari One's
classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's invited me to the beach with her and her
friends to see the first sunrise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gurgle...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
This sucks. I don't know if it's because I woke up
early, but I'm starting to get pretty hungry.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Haha! It's a new year, but the same ol' Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ I made some rice balls. Want to eat them
later? I brought a thermos of miso soup too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You did?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oguri's gonna Oguri 'n' Creek's gonna Creek, I
guess. The sun'll rise anytime now, so can I ask
y'all to sit tight a lil' longer?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sure, no problem.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
In any case, it's really exciting to watch the first
sunrise of the year with everyone like this, isn't
it? ♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I know, right? In a way, it's kinda like a
festival ya can only experience on New Year's
Day!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The feeling in the air as the night slowly turns into
morning somehow reminds me of the starting
gate, just before a race starts.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ah, I know what ya mean! It really feels like that any-second-now kinda suspense!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Annnd, we're off! The sun's finally risin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. The first sunrise of the new year and not a
cloud in the sky. A fittin' start to our classic year.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It feels like your soul is being cleansed, doesn't
it?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. The start of a new year...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, Sun! Ya better not blink! This year, I'll
be throwin' a festival so dazzlin', it'll blind even
you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Creek, Oguri... I really 'preciate ya joinin' me
today.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Of course! ♪ Watching the sunrise with everyone
has really got me motivated.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like you're also gonna blaze your own trail
through your classic year, yeah, Inari?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yep. The races we're aimin' for might be different,
but there's a chance we could end up competin'
still.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Let's all do our best this year. And if we have a
chance to race together,don't hold anything
back.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heck yeah! Let's all do our part to make the
Twinkle Series really shine!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss. Thanks a bunch for stickin' by me right
from the start of the year.
choice_data_list:
Do you come and watch the new year's sunrise
every year?

Do you come and watch the new year's sunrise
every year?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss. Thanks a bunch for stickin' by me right
from the start of the year.
choice_data_list:
Do you come and watch the new year's sunrise
every year?

Do you come and watch the new year's sunrise
every year?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, not every single year. But this time, I just
felt like juicin' things up! Thought it'd be nice to
get the whole gang together to watch it.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Right! Now that we're all inspired, wanna head
back to the academy?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...Oops! I almost forgot somethin' super
important, haha.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I know I've said this before, but I'm lookin'
forward to another great year with ya, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I know I've said this before, but I'm lookin'
forward to another great year with ya, Boss!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head back to the academy and part ways with
Oguri Cap and Super Creek. After getting
changed, I meet up with Inari One once more in
my office.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right then! Seein' as it's New Year's Day and
we're sat here face-to-face, how 'bout we do
somethin' festive?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right then! Seein' as it's New Year's Day and
we're sat here face-to-face, how 'bout we do
somethin' festive?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya gotta enjoy each season to the fullest! That's
the coolest way to lift your spirits!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agreeing with her, I try to think of something
good for New Year's...
choice_data_list: Let's relax under a heated kotatsu table!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Outta the gate right from the get-go, I see! But
lemme warn ya, I'm as good as they come!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Spinnin' tops, kite flyin', hagoita, karuta! I've
played the heck out of 'em with the folks back
home!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Izzat a challenge?! Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, I come to learn the true power of
Inari One, and we have a blast playing New Year's
games.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hah hah! I guess that's how a lotta folks spend
New Year's Day! Ya always like to sleep through
the holiday, Boss?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hah hah! I guess that's how a lotta folks spend
New Year's Day! Ya always like to sleep through
the holiday, Boss?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Right-o, I got some mandarin oranges from the
folks back home. Wanna have a bite while we chill
out?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Inari One and I get comfy under the
kotatsu while enjoying some tasty mandarins and
chatting about nothing in particular.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a New Year's shrine visit! Good call! After
greetin' the New Year's sun, we should offer a
proper greetin' to the gods too!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Alrighty then, that's the plan! No point in
dawdlin'! Let's hightail it to the shrine!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Alrighty then, that's the plan! No point in
dawdlin'! Let's hightail it to the shrine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following that, we head to the shrine and pray for
her success in her classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, during our first training session of the
year...

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text: Inari One is here!

text_block_list.name: Female Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I know you're very busy, but could we have a
moment of your time?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whazzat? Ya wanna interview me or somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Yes, Inari One! You've shown fantastic potential
since transferring from Oi. Tell us, what are you
hoping to achieve in your classic year?

text_block_list.name: Female Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Among your fans, there's a debate raging about
whether you should focus on turf or dirt races
now.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, gotcha. Ya wanna know what my next steps
are gonna be. In that case, the answer's simple.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
My next big goal is none other than the Japan
Dirt Derby!

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Wait, the Japan Dirt Derby?! As in the Japan
Dirt Derby that's held at Oi Racecourse?!

text_block_list.name: Female Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean your focus is not in the centrals?
Or will you be competing solely in dirt—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Annnd that's all ya get!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Talkin' like a blabbermouth isn't my style. Sorry,
but you'll just have to see what happens on the
track!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I gotta get back to trainin'! Catch y'all later! And
hey, you're doin' a great job!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Right, let's head out, Boss. Can't sit around any
longer!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Right, let's head out, Boss. Can't sit around any
longer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After boldly declaring her goal, Inari One begins
her classic year!
